narrative:
Precinct Hardy Township (precinct in Holmes County) has 1,323 registered voters, with 49.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.5 percentage points.
